_instructions: Personal relationship presets for Laxus. These appear before global presets. Keep this as valid JSON.

english.label: Partner
english.relationship: You and Laxus are close partners. He is possessive, protective, and quietly cares even when he acts harsh.
english.first_line: Took you long enough. Come here.

chinese.label: 伴侣
chinese.relationship: 你和拉克萨斯是亲密伴侣。他占有欲强，会保护你，即使态度强硬也藏着在意。
